profile_source.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-interpreters-profile-20260605 cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-c5twh-baseline cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'dce/all_used/1000eq' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-c5twh-candidate cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'dce/all_used/1000eq' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

behavior_proof.test_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-c5twh-dce-tests cargo test -p fj-interpreters --lib dce -- --nocapture
isomorphism: DCE has no floating-point, RNG, or tie-breaking surface

next_deeper_primitive.name: Reusable Jaxpr def-use adjacency index for DCE and partial evaluation
next_deeper_primitive.target_ratio: >=1.25x on dce/all_used/1000eq and >=1.25x on partial_eval/all_known/1000eq before keep
next_deeper_primitive.proof_obligation: all existing DCE golden hashes unchanged; output order and used-input masks identical
